productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men vertigo Brown Shoes
description: Stylish to the T, these dress shoes from the united colors of benetton are perfect for all formal occasions. Slip into these great Oxfords to look like you mean business. The slightly square toe silhouette adds to the charm of these shoes, coupled with contrast stitch detailing. Wear these shoes to look suave in a jiffy! A great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe, it can add tons of character to your outfit in an instant. Upper Full-grain leather upper for added durability and style Slightly squared toe design for increased comfort and style Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Contrast stitch detailing for better structure and attraction Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Sofly padded tongue to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisters Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Big Ben logo on the tongue Midsole EVA midsole for long-term durability and protection of feet against impact Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Fabric lining for increased comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
